def solve(s)
    n = s.length
    prefix_L = Array.new(n + 1, 0)
    prefix_C = Array.new(n + 1, 0)
    prefix_T = Array.new(n + 1, 0)
    (0...n).each do |i|
        prefix_L[i+1] = prefix_L[i] + (s[i] == 'L' ? 1 : 0)
        prefix_C[i+1] = prefix_C[i] + (s[i] == 'C' ? 1 : 0)
        prefix_T[i+1] = prefix_T[i] + (s[i] == 'T' ? 1 : 0)
    end

    suffix_T = Array.new(n, 0)
    (n-1).downto(0) do |i|
        suffix_T[i] = suffix_T[i+1] + (s[i] == 'T' ? 1 : 0)
    end

    original_T_after_C = Array.new(n, 0)
    (0...n).each do |j|
        original_T_after_C[j] = (s[j] == 'C' ? suffix_T[j+1] : 0)
    end

    sum_T_after_C = Array.new(n + 2, 0)
    (n-1).downto(0) do |i|
        sum_T_after_C[i] = original_T_after_C[i] + sum_T_after_C[i+1]
    end

    original_count = sum_T_after_C[0]

    max_added = 0
    (0..n).each do |i|
        added_L = sum_T_after_C[i+1]
        added_C = prefix_L[i] * suffix_T[i]
        added_T = prefix_L[i] * prefix_C[i]
        current_max = [added_L, added_C, added_T].max
        max_added = [max_added, current_max].max
    end

    original_count + max_added
end

def solve(s)
  n = s.length
  prefix_L = Array.new(n + 1, 0)
  prefix_C = Array.new(n + 1, 0)
  prefix_T = Array.new(n + 1, 0)
  
  (0...n).each do |i|
    prefix_L[i+1] = prefix_L[i] + (s[i] == 'L' ? 1 : 0)
    prefix_C[i+1] = prefix_C[i] + (s[i] == 'C' ? 1 : 0)
    prefix_T[i+1] = prefix_T[i] + (s[i] == 'T' ? 1 : 0)
  end
  
  suffix_T = Array.new(n + 1, 0)
  (n-1).downto(0) do |i|
    suffix_T[i] = suffix_T[i+1] + (s[i] == 'T' ? 1 : 0)
  end
  
  original_T_after_C = Array.new(n, 0)
  (0...n).each do |j|
    original_T_after_C[j] = (s[j] == 'C' ? suffix_T[j+1] : 0)
  end
  
  sum_T_after_C = Array.new(n + 2, 0)
  (n-1).downto(0) do |i|
    sum_T_after_C[i] = original_T_after_C[i] + sum_T_after_C[i+1]
  end
  
  original_count = sum_T_after_C[0]
  max_added = 0
  
  (0..n).each do |i|
    added_L = sum_T_after_C[i+1]
    added_C = prefix_L[i] * suffix_T[i]
    added_T = prefix_L[i] * prefix_C[i]
    current_max = [added_L, added_C, added_T].max
    max_added = [max_added, current_max].max
  end
  
  original_count + max_added
end
```
